description_long: This is a medium-sized paperback book standing upright on a flat, light-colored surface. The front cover is dominated by large, bold text in red and black, with no visible illustration or artwork. The book appears to be well-used, with a slightly bent or warped cover and visible creases along the spine. The pages are off-white and the edges are slightly uneven, suggesting frequent handling. The spine is thin and shows some wear, with no visible decorative elements. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on the textual content rather than visual embellishments.
description: A medium-sized paperback book with a bold, text-heavy front cover and a worn, creased spine, standing on a light surface.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, featuring large red and black text with no illustration, and the book stands upright on a flat surface.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, showing the thin, slightly creased spine and the thickness of the pages.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, plain and unadorned, with the book's thickness and page edges apparent.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the opposite side, again highlighting the spine and the edge of the front and back covers.
attribute_title_text: POSTFACE DE LA 3e EDITION DE MARXISME ET THEORIE DE LA PERSONNALITE
attribute_spine_design: The spine is thin, slightly creased, and appears to be plain with no visible text or decorative elements.
